name: Heart of Silver
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Upon releasing Posse, gain [StateArg1]% of the wielder's ATK as {STR} and Shield equal to [StateArg2]% of their DEF. Upon using an Emergency Gnosis, all Awakeners gain [StateArg3] Aliemus at turn end.
lore:
It was a silver-white, clear, and spotless heart.

Made of pure silver, it beat steadily inside its mechanical frame.

It had once been stained by blood, smeared by mud.

But as death's shadow fell, it returned at last to its original form.
